info.name: Microsoft Exchange Microsoft Graph Mailbox Import Export API
info.description:
APIs for discovering, importing, and exporting content from Exchange Online mailboxes in full fidelity through the Microsoft Graph beta endpoint. Enables mailbox migration scenarios and content copying as a replacement for EWS-based approaches. Supports importing and exporting mailbox content including messages, calendar events, and contacts while preserving all metadata and properties.

Contact Support:
 Name: Microsoft Support
 Email: support@microsoft.com

variable.description: (Required) The unique identifier or user principal name
(Required) The unique identifier of the mailbox
(Required) The unique identifier of the folder
(Required) The unique identifier of the item

request.description: Export the full-fidelity content of a specific mailbox item in MIME format. Returns the complete item with all properties, headers, and attachments preserved for migration scenarios.

item.name: Microsoft Exchange Import item into folder

variable.description: (Required) The unique identifier or user principal name
(Required) The unique identifier of the mailbox
(Required) The unique identifier of the folder

request.description: Import a full-fidelity item into the specified mailbox folder. Accepts MIME content and creates the item preserving all properties and metadata. Used for mailbox migration and content copying scenarios.

request.description: List items in a specific mailbox folder for export. Returns items with their metadata for batch export processing. Supports pagination for large folders.
